name: vocdoni-sdk
description: Vocdoni SDK (@vocdoni/sdk) reference skill. Teaches an AI agent the full surface of the Vocdoni voting SDK — client setup, accounts, census types, election creation, all voting variants (approval/ranked/multichoice/quadratic/budget), anonymous (ZK) voting, CSP, and Census3 token-based censuses — with copy-pasteable code recipes.
